title: rutidea gracilis subsp. makokounsis
intro: Rutidea gracilis subsp. makokounsis, also known as Makokounsis, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, typically found in the tropical regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Makokounsis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to soothe skin conditions and alleviate respiratory issues. Makokounsis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or essential oil extraction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
